name: Italian Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, drained (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the VEG-ALL, beans, onion, and celery in a bowl.
2. Make the dressing by combining oil, vinegar, sugar, basil, and garlic; blend well.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetable-bean mixture.
4. Let stand several hours or overnight to marinate.
5. Add olives, tomatoes, and parsley before serving.
